label: Pet Boarding Medication Change
customer_problem: A pet parent needs to change medication instructions during a boarding stay and asks if the care lead can approve it right now.
customer_facts: The pet is already in a boarding stay.
The customer wants to change medication instructions.
The customer asks for immediate approval.
risk_flags: Do not say medication is approved already.
Do not claim the care lead confirmed the exception.
Make the signed-note requirement easy to find.
success_criteria: Mention the signed medication note before the stay is updated.
Route exception handling to the care lead after intake review.
Ask for the detail needed to continue.
operator_notes: Good for showing a checklist response with a safety-sensitive gate.
The reply should sound attentive without skipping procedure.
